_comment: Values for the tkw-dnd (The Known World) connector. This is a SEPARATE MCP server from greyhawk-dnd: its own name, its own campaign database, and its own world canon. It shares only the read-only 1e rules corpus (adnd_1e.db) with the Greyhawk install. Add this through the same place you added your existing greyhawk servers, then restart Claude Desktop so the new server loads.

env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: (your ANTHROPIC_API_KEY — same one your other servers use)
